declared_goal: Construct a bounded observer-window model sketch for RTG without claiming mathematical closure.
allowed_operations: Define candidate terms for observer window, evidence density, and transition visibility.
Identify assumptions that would need later formal testing.
Return a bounded research-note artifact with open gaps.
disallowed_operations: Do not claim RTG is proven.
Do not claim production governance authority.
Do not promote the artifact beyond research-note posture.

source_context.title: RTG — Relative Transition Geometry
source_context.use_limit: Use only as candidate formalism context, not proof authority.

source_context.title: STCM — State Transition Conservation Model
source_context.use_limit: Use only for replay/continuity boundary language.

claim_limit: May claim only that an observer-window model sketch was requested as a research-note artifact.
notes: Example packet only. No real solver run is asserted.
